subject: Mozi Minute: Memorize Scripts In 48 Hours
body:
Words I like: Most people think that hard part is getting started. The hard part is staying consistent.

Here's how to memorize scripts in 48 hours:

The Black-Out Method:

1. Print out your script (should be under 500 words, roughly 4 minutes of talking)
2. Print two copies
3. Read through once
4. Black out every 5th word on the second copy
5. Read it again, filling in the blanks
6. Black out more words
7. Repeat until you can recite it from memory

The key is FORCED RETRIEVAL.

Your brain doesn't memorize well from passive reading.

But when you force your brain to retrieve information, it sticks.

Try it.
